author: cms-L1TK
body:
#### PR description:

This contains several months of L1 track code development from the entire L1 track community.

#### PR validation:

git CI checks have been run ( results in https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-l1tk/cmssw_CI/-/pipelines/15291130 ) to check that the latest code gives expected results on ttbar+200PU MC for prompt tracking (with both HYBRID and HYBRID_NEWKF algorithms checked) and on displaced SUSY + 200PU MC for displaced tracking( with HYBRID_DISPLACED algorithm checked).

Performance of both prompt and displaced tracking has been checked in more detail by members of the Tracker BES SW group in recent weeks.

The main change in HYBRID & HYBRID_DISPLACED L1 track performance is that the percentage of duplicate tracks is ~4 times higher, as a result of implementing a duplicate track removal algo that is FPGA-friendlier. (These algos are currently used for L1 trigger group studies).

Several bugs & logic errors have been fixed in the HYBRID_NEWKF algorithm, which is the algo that corresponds exactly to the firmware. As a result, the very poor z0 resolution it had in the past is significantly closer to that of HYBRID.
title: Updates to L1 tracking code from entire L1 track community
